ast.name: confirm
ast.source: Delete files missing from the snapshot? This removes local files that are not in the latest snapshot.
ast.target: 删除快照中缺失的文件？这将移除不在最新快照中的本地文件。

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: Unpair this device? It will stop syncing immediately.
ast.target: 取消配对此设备？它将立即停止同步。

ast.name: error
ast.source: [yjs] Tried to remove event handler that doesn't exist.
ast.target: [yjs] 尝试移除不存在的事件处理器。

ast.name: error
ast.source: This document was already integrated as a sub-document. You should create a second instance instead with the same guid.
ast.target: 此文档已作为子文档集成。您应该使用相同的 guid 创建第二个实例。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Yjs was already imported. This breaks constructor checks and will lead to issues! - https://github.com/yjs/yjs/issues/438
ast.target: Yjs 已被导入。这会破坏构造函数检查并导致问题！ - https://github.com/yjs/yjs/issues/438

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used to reach your Mylonite server.
ast.target: 用于连接您的 Mylonite 服务器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Writes sync details to the developer console.
ast.target: 将同步详情写入开发者控制台。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Uploads this vault so new devices can start faster.
ast.target: 上传此保险库，以便新设备可以更快启动。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Restores the newest snapshot from the server.
ast.target: 从服务器恢复最新的快照。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Removes local credentials and stops syncing this vault.
ast.target: 移除本地凭据并停止同步此保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use this when the QR code is unavailable.
ast.target: 当二维码不可用时使用此方法。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use this with the server URL if the link does not open.
ast.target: 如果链接无法打开，请将此与服务器 URL 一起使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Approve only when this code matches on both devices.
ast.target: 仅当此代码在两台设备上匹配时才批准。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Device is not paired. Pair it before creating a snapshot.
ast.target: 设备未配对。请在创建快照前进行配对。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Device is not paired. Pair it before restoring a snapshot.
ast.target: 设备未配对。请在恢复快照前进行配对。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No snapshots found. Create a snapshot on another device first.
ast.target: 未找到快照。请先在另一台设备上创建快照。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Missing server URL or token. Enter both to continue.
ast.target: 缺少服务器 URL 或令牌。请输入两者以继续。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This device is not ready to create an invite.
ast.target: 此设备尚未准备好创建邀请。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This device is not paired. Pair it before authorizing another device.
ast.target: 此设备未配对。请在授权另一台设备前进行配对。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No pending device request to approve.
ast.target: 没有待批准的设备请求。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invite expired. Create a new invite.
ast.target: 邀请已过期。请创建新的邀请。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invite was already approved. Ask the new device to check approval.
ast.target: 邀请已被批准。请让新设备检查批准状态。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The pending request changed. Review the safety code again.
ast.target: 待处理的请求已更改。请再次检查安全码。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Device approved. The new device will finish automatically.
ast.target: 设备已批准。新设备将自动完成。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Missing join request. Enter the invite again.
ast.target: 缺少加入请求。请重新输入邀请。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Still waiting for approval from a paired device.
ast.target: 仍在等待已配对设备的批准。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Device paired. Snapshot restore failed, so normal sync will catch up instead.
ast.target: 设备已配对。快照恢复失败，因此将通过常规同步来追赶。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invite expired. Create a new one.
ast.target: 邀请已过期。请创建新的。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Still waiting for the new device.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invite state is invalid. Create a new invite.
ast.target: 邀请状态无效。请创建新的邀请。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid join request. Enter the invite again.
ast.target: 无效的加入请求。请重新输入邀请码。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invite expired. Enter a new one.
ast.target: 邀请已过期。请输入新的邀请码。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enter the grouped invite code shown on the paired device.
ast.target: 请输入配对设备上显示的群组邀请码。

ast.name: text
ast.source: First device for a new vault

ast.name: text
ast.source: Paste the pairing token from `mylonite init`.
ast.target: 粘贴来自 `mylonite init` 的配对令牌。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Scan the invite QR code or enter the invite code from a paired device.
ast.target: 扫描邀请二维码或输入来自配对设备的邀请码。
